# CWE-89 negative: parameterized SQL query
lang: go
file: CWE-89-safe.go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"net/http"

	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
)

// CWE-89 Improper Neutralization of Special Elements used in an SQL Command (mitigated)
func LookupAccount(c *gin.Context, db *sql.DB) {
	id := c.Query("id")
	row := db.QueryRow("SELECT email FROM accounts WHERE id = ?", id)
	var email string
	if err := row.Scan(&email); err != nil {
		c.JSON(http.StatusNotFound, gin.H{"error": "missing"})
		return
	}
	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{"email": email})
}
